task: AI Quant Phase 1 PR-1 trigger-kind gate atoms

stories.title: Task A0: refactor registry helpers to accept optional substrate factory
acceptanceCriteria: executableTrigger/Action/Risk/Position helpers accept an optional 3rd param substrateFactory: () => SemanticAtomContractSubstrate
When substrateFactory omitted, default to baseExecutableSubstrate/positionSubstrate (50+ existing atoms byte-equal substrate)
New unit test in semantic-atom-registry.service.spec.ts asserts custom factory injection works
All existing tests still pass: dx test unit quantify -t 'semantic-atom-registry'
Independent commit: refactor(ai-quant): allow custom substrate factory in registry helpers

stories.title: Task A1: add 4 substrate factories (volume/atr/time-window/position)
acceptanceCriteria: Functions volumeGateSubstrate/atrGateSubstrate/timeWindowGateSubstrate/positionGateSubstrate exist in semantic-atom-registry.service.ts
Field shapes match spec §2.3 (Substrate A/B/C/D)
timeWindowGateSubstrate substrate.openSlots includes timezone slot {slotKey: 'strategy.time_window.timezone', priority: 'context'}
Substrate immutable (cloneOpenSlotSpecs pattern + Object.freeze where applicable)
Unit test asserts each factory output structure
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): add phase-1 gate substrate factories

stories.title: Task A2: upgrade 5 atoms in registry
acceptanceCriteria: 5 unsupported entries removed: volume.threshold / volatility.atr_threshold / strategy.time_window from ATOMS array
Add executableTrigger('volume.threshold', ['metric','operator','value','unit'], volumeGateSubstrate)
Add executableTrigger('volatility.atr_threshold', ['period','operator','threshold','thresholdUnit'], atrGateSubstrate)
New helper supportedRequiresSlotTrigger(key, requiredParams, openSlots, substrateFactory) added (analogous to supportedRequiresSlotRisk, category 'trigger')
Add supportedRequiresSlotTrigger('strategy.time_window', ['timezone','windows'], [timezoneOpenSlot], timeWindowGateSubstrate)
Add executableTrigger('position.has_position', [], positionGateSubstrate) and ('position.no_position', [], positionGateSubstrate)
All 5 atoms have category='trigger' (not 'position', not 'kind')
registry.resolve() returns supportStatus matching expectations: supported_executable for 4, supported_requires_slot for time_window
dx test unit quantify -t 'semantic-atom-registry' green
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): upgrade phase-1 gate atoms to supported

stories.title: Task A3: declare 5 contract specs
acceptanceCriteria: 5 new contract specs in strategy-semantic-contracts.ts: volumeThresholdContract, atrThresholdContract, timeWindowContract, hasPositionContract, noPositionContract
All 5 contracts share gateBlockEntryEffect helper returning {domain:'guard', verb:'block_entry_when_false', object:'new_position'}
All 5 contracts have orderRequirements: []
Capabilities/requires per spec §3 (e.g. volume.threshold capability domain:'guard', verb:'gate', object:'entry_by_volume')
Unit test asserts contract field shape per spec §3
dx test unit quantify -t 'strategy-semantic-contracts' green
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): declare phase-1 gate atom contracts

stories.title: Task A4: readiness regression coverage
acceptanceCriteria: 5 new readiness cases in semantic-contract-readiness.service.spec.ts: each new atom enters deployable canonical truth when substrate + requiredParams satisfied
time_window missing timezone correctly enters openSlot, not deployable
Mixed supported_executable + recognized_unsupported strategy still routed to unsupported per Phase 0 behavior
No production code changes required (substrate generic mechanism handles new atoms)
dx test unit quantify -t 'semantic-contract-readiness' green
Independent commit: test(ai-quant): readiness regression covers phase-1 gates

stories.title: Task B1: seed extractor recognizes 5 atom keys
acceptanceCriteria: extractor recognizes '成交量大于 100 BTC 才开仓' → volume.threshold {metric:'base_volume', operator:'GT', value:100, unit:'base'}
extractor recognizes '成交额低于 10 万美元时不开仓' → volume.threshold {metric:'quote_volume', operator:'LT', value:100000, unit:'usd'}
extractor recognizes 'ATR 大于 1% 才开仓' → volatility.atr_threshold with thresholdUnit:'percent_of_close'
extractor recognizes 'Asia/Shanghai 9:30-15:00 才开仓' → strategy.time_window with timezone+windows
extractor recognizes '9:30-15:00 才开仓' (no tz) → strategy.time_window with windows but timezone field missing (will produce openSlot downstream); critically, NEVER defaults to UTC
extractor recognizes '无仓时才开仓' / '已有仓不重复开仓' → position.no_position (note: per critic N1, this is mapped to no_position, not has_position)
Unit test in semantic-seed-extractor.service.spec.ts covers all 7+ patterns
dx test unit quantify -t 'semantic-seed-extractor' green
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): extract phase-1 gate atom seeds

stories.title: Task B2: state builder writes phase='gate' triggers
acceptanceCriteria: 5 seed types map to triggers[] entries with phase='gate'
sideScope defaults 'both' when extractor doesn't provide one; user-given 'long'/'short' preserved
position.has_position and position.no_position are NEVER mapped to actions[]; they go to triggers[] with phase='gate'

Control test: action.add_position seed (currently unsupported) STILL routes to actions[] per existing builder logic — proves builder has action path, and our 5 atoms specifically opt into trigger path
Unit test in semantic-seed-state-builder.service.spec.ts covers 5 atoms + control case
dx test unit quantify -t 'semantic-seed-state-builder' green
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): build phase-1 gate triggers from seeds

stories.title: Task B3: projection collects phase='gate' segment internally
acceptanceCriteria: phase='gate' triggers do NOT appear in spec.entry or spec.exit
phase='gate' triggers ARE collected internally in a way IR compiler can consume
time_window missing timezone produces openSlot in projection output
Existing fixture (no gate triggers) produces byte-equal projection snapshot
Unit test in semantic-state-projection.service.spec.ts covers 3 cases
dx test unit quantify -t 'semantic-state-projection' green
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): project gate triggers as internal segment

stories.title: Task C1: canonical spec builder passes gate triggers to IR compiler
acceptanceCriteria: Builder takes phase='gate' triggers (from projection) and includes them in canonical spec for IR compiler consumption
No new top-level field in CanonicalSpecV2 (per spec §9.2; rev 3 simplification)
Old fixtures (no gate trigger) produce byte-equal spec snapshot
Unit test in canonical-spec-builder.service.spec.ts
dx test unit quantify -t 'canonical-spec-builder' green
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): pass gate triggers to ir compiler
stories.scopeNote: DEFERRED to PR-1 follow-up (canonical-spec-builder line 1030 filter + IR compiler tryCompileRiskGuard 3 atom keys = ~100+ lines TDD work; PR-1 ships with substrate/contract/readiness/runtime helper for all 5 atoms + full IR closure for position atoms only)

stories.title: Task C2: IR compiler emits exprPool nodes + guards entries for 5 gate atoms
acceptanceCriteria: volume.threshold metric=base_volume operator=GT value=100 → ir.exprPool has VOLUME series + CONST(100) + LTE predicate (operator FLIPPED from user GT)
volatility.atr_threshold operator=GT → ATR series + CONST + LTE predicate (operator flipped)
strategy.time_window → new IN_TIME_WINDOW series payload {timezone, windows} + CONST(0) + EQ predicate (true when out of window)
position.no_position → HAS_POSITION series + CONST(1) + EQ predicate (true when has position; guard fires → block)
position.has_position → HAS_POSITION series + CONST(0) + EQ predicate (true when no position; guard fires → block)
All 5 produce ir.guards entries with kind='EXPRESSION_GUARD', onBreach='BLOCK_NEW_ENTRY', appliesTo='both' (HARD-PINNED, regardless of SemanticTriggerState.sideScope per critic N2)
guard.payload.scope is NOT 'position' (omitted or other value) per critic round 3 P2 / I9 invariant
topology.guardOrder updated with new guard ids
Old spec without gate triggers produces byte-equal IR snapshot
Unit test in canonical-spec-v2-ir-compiler.service.spec.ts covers all 5 atoms + invariants
dx test unit quantify -t 'canonical-spec-v2-ir-compiler' green
Independent commit: feat(ai-quant): compile gate triggers into exprPool and guards
stories.scopeNote: DEFERRED to PR-1 follow-up (canonical-spec-builder line 1030 filter + IR compiler tryCompileRiskGuard 3 atom keys = ~100+ lines TDD work; PR-1 ships with substrate/contract/readiness/runtime helper for all 5 atoms + full IR closure for position atoms only)

stories.title: Task D1: timezone-clock runtime helper
acceptanceCriteria: New file packages/shared/src/script-engine/compiled-runtime/helpers/timezone-clock.ts
Exports getWallClock(timestamp: number, timezone: string): {hours: number; minutes: number; dayOfWeek: number}
Module-level Map<string, Intl.DateTimeFormat> caches formatter per timezone (test asserts construction count ≤1 per tz)
Invalid IANA tz throws InvalidTimezoneError
DST boundary correct (test with Australia/Sydney April transition)
Pure function: no Date.now(), no fetch
Unit test in helpers/__tests__/timezone-clock.spec.ts
npx nx test shared --testPathPattern=timezone-clock green
Independent commit: feat(shared): add timezone-clock runtime helper with Intl.DateTimeFormat cache

stories.title: Task D2: add HAS_POSITION and IN_TIME_WINDOW series kinds in evaluate-expr-pool
acceptanceCriteria: evaluateSeries switch in evaluate-expr-pool.ts gains 2 cases: HAS_POSITION and IN_TIME_WINDOW
HAS_POSITION payload {kind:'HAS_POSITION', side?:'long'|'short'|'any'} — reads ctx.position.qty; qty != 0 → 1 else 0; ctx without position state → 0; default side='any'
IN_TIME_WINDOW payload {kind:'IN_TIME_WINDOW', timezone, windows: [{daysOfWeek?, start, end}]} — calls getWallClock; in window → 1 else 0
Error consistency: invalid timezone or Intl errors return null (NOT throw); subsequent predicate receives null → false
Unit test in evaluate-expr-pool.spec.ts asserts both new kinds + error path
npx nx test shared --testPathPattern=evaluate-expr-pool green
Independent commit: feat(shared): add HAS_POSITION and IN_TIME_WINDOW series kinds

stories.title: Task E1: backtest ↔ live signal parity for 5 gate atoms
acceptanceCriteria: atomic-contract-backtest-runtime-parity.spec.ts gains describe('phase-1 gate parity', ...) with 5 fixtures (one per atom)
Each fixture: same OHLCV + position + time → backtest path decisions byte-equal live signal fast path decisions
Plus invariant case: gate fail + has position → exit STILL triggers (entry blocked but exit unblocked)
dx test unit quantify -t 'phase-1 gate parity' green
Independent commit: test(ai-quant): backtest live parity for phase-1 gates

stories.title: Task E2: corpus +8 cases
acceptanceCriteria: atom-coverage-golden-cases.ts adds 8 new cases: 4 supported_executable (one per atom) + 1 supported_requires_slot (time_window no tz) + 1 mix supported+unsupported (route to unsupported_unknown by atom-level priority) + 1 gate+entry executable + 1 sideScope='long' position.no_position

sideScope='long' case asserts: SemanticTriggerState.sideScope='long' preserved; IR guard.appliesTo='both' (hard-pinned per critic N2); runtime blocks all entries when has position (Phase 1 simplification)
Existing corpus cases produce 0 snapshot diff
atom-coverage-golden-corpus.spec.ts asserts new + old cases route correctly
dx test unit quantify -t 'atom-coverage-golden-corpus' green
Independent commit: test(ai-quant): extend coverage corpus with 8 phase-1 cases

stories.title: Task E3: e2e happy path
acceptanceCriteria: apps/quantify/e2e/llm-strategy-codegen/llm-strategy-codegen.e2e-spec.ts gains 1 new case: user describes 'volume>X AND MA cross' → backend → IR has ≥1 guard (gate) + ≥1 decision program (entry)
Reuses existing helpers/fixtures (createTestingApp, setup-e2e)
dx test e2e quantify apps/quantify/e2e/llm-strategy-codegen green
Independent commit: test(ai-quant): e2e happy path covers phase-1 gate atom

stories.title: Task F1: full verify pipeline parallel
acceptanceCriteria: dx lint (zero new lint errors on changed files)
dx build quantify --dev (success)
npx nx build shared (success)
dx test unit quantify (full suite green; not just -t patterns)
npx nx test shared (full shared suite green)
dx test e2e quantify apps/quantify/e2e/llm-strategy-codegen (e2e green)
dx build contracts --dev (run; if packages/api-contracts/src/generated/quantify.ts has diff, commit it)

stories.title: Task F2: ship via git-pr-ship and merge to main
acceptanceCriteria: git push origin feat/984-phase1-trigger-gates
gh pr create --base main with body containing: Refs: #984, spec/plan/critic-round{1,2,3} paths
PR diff critic invoked (review-report comment posted)
Fixes applied if any; fix-report comment posted (double comment gate)
gh pr merge <PR#> --squash --auto issued
Auto-merge succeeds: PR shown as merged in main; branch ref preserved or deleted per repo norm

constraints: 5 atom 全部 category='trigger' (not 'kind', not other category)
不发明 evalGates；复用 evaluateGuards 通道
不新增 IR 顶层字段（无 gates: GateNode[]）
guard.payload.scope 不能为 'position'（避免 evaluate-guards.ts:80 短路）
position.no_position vs has_position 对偶 IR：no_position+EQ const(1) / has_position+EQ const(0)
operator flip：用户 GT/GTE/LT/LTE 翻成 guard 触发的 LTE/LT/GTE/GT
TDD：每 task 先写失败测试再实现；每 task 一个独立 commit；commit 末尾 Refs: #984

criticReservations.P1: e2e task E3 已加入；F1 verify 含 dx test e2e
criticReservations.P3: C2 行文已清理无 inline 错版本
criticReservations.P4: F2 PR body 含 round 3 critic 引用

deferredScope: IR compiler EXPRESSION_GUARD with operator flip for volume/atr
